title: The bed under you, the room around you
subtitle: A short grounding visualisation for arriving in the body and the room before sleep.
excerpt: A short grounding visualisation for Day 8 of the SLEEP program. You notice the physical reality of where you are (bed, room, your own body) and let that become enough.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 8 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short grounding visualisation for Day 8 of the SLEEP program. Not a mental-travel practice, the opposite. You do not go anywhere. You arrive where you already are.
Lie still. Eyes closed. Let your awareness drop from your head down into your body.
Notice the bed under you. The mattress, its texture and give, the exact way it holds your weight. You have been in this bed many times, notice it as if for the first time.
Notice the pillow under your head. The duvet or blanket across your body. The temperature of the air.
Now expand outward. Notice the room around you. The walls, close or far. The ceiling above. The darkness or the faint light. This specific room, where you are right now.
You are here. Not in tomorrow. Not in this morning. Here, in this bed, in this room, in this body.
Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 8 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
